input: URGENT FORWARD THIS TO EVERYONE: Pandoh Dam authorities have confirmed the dam is about to breach due to heavy rainfall. All residents downstream in Mandi district must evacuate immediately. Government not informing public to avoid panic. Share to save lives!
notes: 'Share to save lives' + 'govt hiding this' structure, no named official source.

input: Breaking: All schools in Himachal Pradesh ordered closed tomorrow due to state-wide protests. Confirmed by Education Department. Please inform all parents.
notes: No order number/link despite claiming official confirmation.

input: CBSE Class 12 Physics paper has been LEAKED. Same paper being circulated in Delhi and Punjab coaching centers. Exam likely to be postponed. Forward to all students before it's deleted.
Alert from Geological Survey: A major earthquake of magnitude 7+ is predicted to hit Himachal Pradesh and surrounding states today between 4-6 PM. Stay outdoors and avoid buildings during this time.
notes: Earthquakes cannot be predicted with a specific time window by any legitimate body.
